title: spilled temporaries in always blocks use continuous assign

features.name: temporary variable with continuous assignment inside always block
features.description: Code should include a temporary variable declared inside a procedural (always) block that is assigned via a continuous assign statement, which is semantically incorrect

features.name: common subexpression temporary used in procedural conditional
features.description: Code should include a temporary created from common subexpression optimization inside an always block, used as a condition in an if statement within the same procedural block

features.name: automatic logic variable in always block
features.description: Code should include an automatic logic variable declared inside an always block, used within procedural context
